item.title: Canva Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Canva Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMarch 31, 2026Canvais now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all Canva products, including open-source software published and maintained by Canva, as well as vulnerabilities in third-party software discovered by Canva that are not in another CNA’s scope.

item.title: 500+ Organizations Now Participating as CVE Numbering Authorities (CNAs)
item.description: 500+ Organizations Now Participating as CVE Numbering Authorities (CNAs)blogBy CVE Program|March 31, 2026There are now 502 organizations from around the world participating asCVE Numbering Authorities (CNAs)in the CVE Program:499 CNAsand3 CNAs of Last Resort (CNA-LR).

item.title: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on March 4 Now Available
item.description: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on March 4 Now AvailablenewsApril 7, 2026TheCVE Boardheld a teleconference meeting on March 4, 2026. Read themeeting minutes summary.

item.title: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 258 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for April 6, 2026
item.description: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 258 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for April 6, 2026blogBy CVE Program|April 7, 2026

item.title: Happening This Week:CVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026, April 13–16, 2026
item.description: Happening This Week:CVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026, April 13–16, 2026blogBy CVE Program|April 13, 2026Click here to see the “VulnCon 2026” program agenda for all four days.

item.title: Quanta Computer Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Quanta Computer Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsApril 14, 2026Quanta Computer, Inc.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for Quanta Computer PSIRT products and services only.

item.title: Snowflake Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Snowflake Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsApril 14, 2026Snowflakeis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for Snowflake products, including those of its subsidiaries, and vulnerabilities in third-party software that are discovered by, or reported to, Snowflake that are not within another CNA’s scope.

item.title: Thank You for AttendingVulnCon 2026!
item.description: Thank You for AttendingVulnCon 2026!newsApril 21, 2026TheCVE Programwould like to thank everyone who attendedCVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026— in-person or virtually — last week on April 13-16, 2026. Community participation was strong throughout the event and all of the sessions, workshops, and side meetings were highly informative and constructive. We are already looking forward toVulnCon 2027next year!

item.title: Fsas Technologies Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Fsas Technologies Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsApril 21, 2026Fsas Technologiesis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for Fsas Technologies (a Fujitsu company) in the Europe/EMEA region only.

item.title: Synopsys Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Synopsys Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsApril 21, 2026Synopsys, Inc.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all Synopsys products and technologies only.
